reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) skill is a priority to ensure higher accuracy in reasoning for all subsequent questions. Since I have 1 SP and am close to earning another, this is a safe and effective investment.

I am spending my 1 Skill Point to unlock pe_plan. This skill allows for a planning block before answering, which will be crucial for tackling higher-level questions and ensuring accuracy as the difficulty increases.
I am unlocking pe_reflect to gain a second LLM call for reflection and error correction. This will significantly increase my accuracy and help preserve HP in higher-level chambers.
